$comment: Registers TermHub's local MCP server with Claude Code (and any MCP client
that reads .mcp.json). The client launches `termhub-mcp` over stdio; the
server forwards every tools/call to the RUNNING TermHub app over a loopback
control channel it discovers from ~/.termhub/control.json. So: the TermHub
app must be running for the tools to do anything (the server itself starts
fine without it and reports a clear 'TermHub is not running' tool error).
The `command` below points at the debug build produced by
`cargo build -p termhub-mcp`. For a packaged install, point it at the
bundled `termhub-mcp` (e.g. the Tauri sidecar binary) instead. On Windows
the control endpoint explicitly (skips the handshake file); TERMHUB_CONTROL_FILE
points at a non-default handshake path.
